categories.name: MEL & Field Data Tools
categories.description: Open-source tools for data collection, field pipelines, data quality, and MEL dashboards

items.name: ODK Central
items.description: Self-hostable backend for ODK/SurveyCTO-compatible data collection with web UI for form management, submission review, user access control, and a REST API.

items.name: ODK Collect
items.description: Android data collection app paired with ODK Central. Fully offline-capable with customizable form flows for field work.

items.name: KoBoToolbox (KoboCat)
items.description: Open-source survey server built on ODK, widely used in humanitarian and development contexts. Features web interface, built-in data quality dashboards, and a free cloud tier.

items.name: DIME GitHub Trainings
items.description: GitHub training materials and workflow toolkit by DIME Analytics for organizing research teams on GitHub with reproducible data pipelines.

items.name: Great Expectations
items.description: Data testing, documentation, and profiling tool. Runs as a CLI to generate HTML data quality reports for pipeline validation — automated data quality checks for survey datasets.

items.name: Plotly Dash
items.description: Python framework for building data apps and dashboards without JavaScript. Production-ready MEL dashboards for client delivery without a full web app build.

items.name: Streamlit
items.description: Turn Python analysis scripts into shareable web apps. Ideal for quick interactive visualizations for field monitoring, partner presentations, and MEL reporting.

categories.name: Electoral & Political Data Tools
categories.description: Scrapers, parsers, and datasets for Indian electoral rolls, election results, and political data

items.name: India Votes Data
items.description: Automated tool to collect, clean, and store Indian parliamentary and assembly election results in structured CSV/JSON from ECI website using headless browser scraping.

items.name: Parse Unsearchable Rolls
items.description: Tool for parsing unsearchable (scanned image) electoral rolls from Indian states where rolls are published as non-searchable PDFs.

items.name: Google Vision OCR for Electoral Rolls
items.description: Uses Google Vision API to extract text from unreadable electoral rolls. Essential for states with inconsistent PDF quality across districts.

items.name: India Religion & Politics Data
items.description: Polling booth and constituency-level election data with religious demography estimates based on name analysis. Data goes to booth level for ward-level analysis.

items.name: DataMeet
items.description: India's civic data collective. Repos include shapefiles for assembly and parliamentary constituencies, MGNREGA social audit data, and other public datasets.

categories.name: Air Quality Tools & Dashboards

items.name: OpenAQ Python SDK
items.description: Official Python CLI and SDK for OpenAQ API v3. Query by location, country, date range, and pollutant. The v1/v2 endpoints are retired (HTTP 410).

items.name: openair (R Package)
items.description: Gold-standard R package for air quality analysis from King's College London. Includes polar plots, wind roses, time variation plots, source attribution, and meteorological normalisation.

items.name: Awesome Air Quality
items.description: Curated list of air quality tools, SDKs, and data sources maintained by OpenAQ. Reference before building new air quality pipeline components.

items.name: Grafana
items.description: Production-grade self-hostable dashboards for real-time sensor data. Connects to time-series databases (InfluxDB, TimescaleDB), supports geospatial map panels and OpenAQ integration.

items.name: d-saikrishna Air Quality Visuals
items.description: Air quality visualizations including CPCB daily AQI bulletins via Datasette, Bokeh charts, and TROPOMI satellite data (NO2, SO2, HCHO, O3) for 104 Indian airsheds via Google Earth Engine.

categories.name: Legal Research Tools
categories.description: Tools and datasets for Indian legal research, court data retrieval, and legal NLP

items.name: eCourts Toolkit
items.description: CLI Python tool (on PyPI) for bulk retrieval of case information from eCourts Service. Covers all High Courts and benches. Single-threaded to avoid overloading servers.

items.name: Indian Supreme Court Judgments
items.description: Supreme Court judgements 1950–2025 with metadata in JSON and Parquet formats, in English and regional languages. Hosted on AWS S3 under CC-BY-4.0.

items.name: Indian High Court Judgments
items.description: Judgments from all 25 Indian High Courts with raw metadata in JSON and structured metadata in Parquet. ~1TB total, updated quarterly.

items.name: Awesome Legal Data
items.description: Curated map of Indian legal data landscape: India Code, Supreme Court judgments, eCourts/NJDG, Indian Kanoon, OpenNyAI datasets for legal NLP.

categories.name: Data Infrastructure & Pipelines
categories.description: Workflow orchestration, data transformation, and reporting tools for production data pipelines

items.name: Apache Airflow
items.description: Standard open-source workflow orchestrator for scheduled data pipelines. Web UI for monitoring runs and alerting on failures. Suitable for sensor ingestion, scraping, and corpus updates.

items.name: dbt Core
items.description: Data transformation tool that lets you write SQL transformations with version control, documentation, and automated testing. Changes the reproducibility game for data pipelines.

items.name: Evidence
items.description: Build interactive data visualizations in pure SQL and Markdown. Generates static shareable websites with interactive charts — suited for data journalism and MEL reporting.

items.name: dlt (data load tool)
items.description: Python library for declarative data loading — extract from APIs, databases, and files into warehouses. 150+ verified sources including REST APIs.

items.name: n8n
items.description: Visual workflow automation with 400+ integrations — connect APIs, databases, and AI models with a node-based editor. Self-hostable alternative to Zapier.

items.name: Langflow
items.description: Visual framework for building multi-agent and RAG applications. Drag-and-drop components, Python-based, integrates with LangChain ecosystem.

items.name: Dify
items.description: Open-source LLM app development platform — visual prompt orchestration, RAG pipelines, agent workflows, and observability. Supports 100+ model providers.

categories.name: Productivity & Workflow
categories.description: AI scheduling assistants, meeting tools, project management, and workflow automation

items.name: Ting MCP
items.description: AI meeting scheduler that works by CC-ing into email threads — checks calendars, suggests times, sends invites, handles no-shows, and provides pre-call briefs with attendee research.

items.name: Cal.com MCP
items.description: Open-source scheduling infrastructure — manage availability, booking links, and event types programmatically via MCP.

items.name: Linear MCP
items.description: Project management and issue tracking for software teams — create issues, manage sprints, and track progress via MCP.

items.name: Notion MCP
items.description: Read, create, and update Notion pages, databases, and blocks programmatically — connect your knowledge base to AI workflows.

items.name: Slack MCP
items.description: Send messages, read channels, search conversations, and manage Slack workspaces via the Model Context Protocol.

items.name: Todoist MCP
items.description: Task management via MCP — create, update, complete, and organise tasks and projects in Todoist from AI workflows.

items.name: Google Workspace MCP
items.description: Access Google Drive, Docs, Sheets, and Gmail programmatically — search files, read documents, and manage email via MCP.

items.name: Trello MCP
items.description: Kanban-style project management — create boards, lists, and cards, move tasks through workflows via MCP.
